non_blocking_notes: `git diff --check main...HEAD` passed, aside from read-only sandbox `xcrun` cache warnings.

Full writable proof (`npm run check`, `npm test`, `npm run test:e2e`, `npm run build`) could not run in this read-only Gate 4 sandbox because Astro/Vite need to write generated/cache files. Gate 5/CI still must run it before merge.
Secret scan found only env var names and test placeholders such as `test-secret` and `tok-*`; no real secrets were found.

Brand scan found no diff-added member-facing em/en dashes in changed `src`/`convex` source. Gold use in the panel slice is confined to recognition surfaces, and no live nav item uses the dormant `soon` affordance.

spec_compliance.evidence: Admin functions resolve the signed-in member server-side through `requireAdmin`/`requireSuperAdmin`, with deny-by-default allowlists. Certificate revoke/reissue and platform health are super-admin-only; operational admin queues, events, opportunities, partners, reports and audit views are admin-gated.

Minor and restricted_unknown lanes are server-blocked from adult events, opportunities, directory and pipeline. `publishEvent` refuses youth events at launch, guardian consent remains tokened and explicit, and admin resend cannot confirm consent.

Member event list/detail/RSVP/pass paths apply lane and lifecycle checks server-side. RSVP enforces capacity, waitlist promotion, priority windows and closed registration. Admin publish/edit paths validate live logistics, freeze live audience/time invariants, notify cancel/postpone holders, and check-in revalidates seat, time, lifecycle and lane before attendance credit.

Board/detail/apply paths enforce active lifecycle, lane/audience, profile completeness, deadline, one-application and evergreen rules. Own application history remains visible for the member even after lane changes. Admin result recording rechecks current winner eligibility and blocks deciding a cycle until non-withdrawn applications have results.

Standing promotion is idempotent and tied to profile completion plus attended event or application evidence. Directory returns only directory-tier fields for active, opted-in Active Member+ standard/ally rows. Notifications resolve the caller from auth and only read or mark that member's own rows.

spec_compliance.criterion: Admin data minimization and audit trail
spec_compliance.evidence: Member lists omit emails, dossiers mask contact and member audit actors, raw contact requires a per-member audited reveal, reports are aggregate-only, and reviewed member-affecting writes create PII-light audit rows.

Changed server boundaries validate user/admin free text lengths, emails, HTTPS URLs, upload MIME/size, ownership, state transitions and result constraints. Member-facing strings reviewed use plain language with no diff-added em/en dashes.

summary: No ship-blocking authorization, safeguarding, input-validation, data-leakage, audit-trail, or spec-delivery gaps were found in the current diff against `main`.
